steps.title: Link specialization to risk
steps.content: The passage says the Kaua'i 'amakihi is a specialized Hawaiian bird with traits suited to a well-defined habitat. The however sentence gives the main point: that specialization makes the species especially vulnerable to environmental changes.

steps.title: Reject incomplete main ideas
steps.content: Choice A invents a claim about not sharing a habitat. Choice B mentions specialization and related birds but omits vulnerability. Choice D overgeneralizes to Hawaiian birds as a group and misses the risk from habitat disturbance. The answer is C.
